settings.heading: Delivery coverage
settings.content: We aim to deliver across Pakistan where courier service is available. Delivery availability may vary by city, address and courier route.

settings.heading: Order confirmation
settings.content: Orders may be confirmed by call, WhatsApp, SMS or email before dispatch, especially for Cash on Delivery orders.

settings.heading: Delivery timeline
settings.content:
Delivery time depends on:

  • City and courier route
  • Order confirmation timing
  • Stock availability
  • Public holidays or weather/courier delays

settings.heading: Cash on Delivery
settings.content: COD is available where supported. The customer must provide an active phone number and complete address for confirmation.

settings.heading: Shipping charges
settings.content: Shipping charges, if applicable, will be shown at checkout or confirmed before dispatch.

settings.heading: Failed delivery
settings.content: If the courier cannot reach the customer, the parcel may be returned. Morganics may reconfirm details before resending.

settings.heading: Damaged parcel
settings.content: If the parcel arrives visibly damaged, take clear photos before opening and contact support quickly.

settings.heading: Shipping Policy
settings.intro: Morganics ships premium dry fruits, nuts, seeds, herbs, botanicals and pantry products across Pakistan through available courier services.
settings.cta_text: Message us with the product name, desired quantity and your city. Our team will guide you with availability and next steps.
